---
title: "Post With Code"
author: "Harlow Malloc"
date: "2026-06-09"
categories: [news, code, analysis]
# image: "image.jpg"

format:
  html:
    code-fold: false
jupyter: python3
---

<!-- ```{python}
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
import json
from unidecode import unidecode

df = pd.read_csv("DS_PRENOMS_data.csv", sep=";", dtype={'GEO': str})
df_list_dpt = pd.read_csv("departments_regions_france_2016.csv", sep=",", dtype={'departmentCode': str, "regionCode": str})

display(df) 
display(df.dtypes)
``` -->

# Interactive Scatter Plot

```{python}
import pandas as pd
import plotly.express as px

# Sample data
df = pd.DataFrame({
    "x": [1, 2, 3, 4, 5],
    "y": [2, 1, 4, 3, 5],
    "label": ["A", "B", "C", "D", "E"]
})

fig = px.scatter(
    df,
    x="x",
    y="y",
    text="label",
    title="Interactive Plotly Scatter Plot"
)

fig.update_traces(textposition="top center")
fig.show()
```
